name: aria-ark
description: Aria Research Kit (ARK) skills for building applications with Project Aria smart glasses. Covers data processing (VRS, MPS, calibration) and real-time webapp development (WebSocket streaming, 3D visualization, voice pipeline).

interface.shortDescription: Project Aria smart glasses development skills.
interface.longDescription: Skills for building with Project Aria smart glasses and the Aria Research Kit, including VRS data processing, MPS workflows, calibration, live streaming, 3D visualization, and voice pipelines.
defaultPrompt: Read sensor data from an Aria VRS recording.
Run MPS on a Project Aria recording.
Build a live Aria Gen2 web app.
